political.s: Progressive made $192,373 in contributions during 2024 with mixed lean. Historical donations show mixed bipartisan approach to political contributions and minimal federal lobbying activity.

charity.s: Progressive Insurance Foundation established in 2001 provides approximately $11.7 million annually in charitable disbursements. Focus areas include highway safety, homelessness, education, veterans support, and employee-directed giving through Name Your Cause program.
charity.focus: Highway safety, homelessness, education, veterans, employee-directed philanthropic causes

environment.s: Progressive announced aspirational goal to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions 40% by 2030 and achieve carbon neutrality by 2025. Investments include 1.8MW solar array, LED lighting upgrades, and renewable energy procurement of 69,900 MWh in 2024.

labor.s: Glassdoor DEI rating of 4.3/5 stars based on 4,606 employee ratings, equal to insurance industry average. Employee satisfaction at 3.9/5 stars. No major OSHA or NLRB violations identified in search results.

dei.s: Progressive maintains pro-DEI stance grounded in Core Values with aspirational goal to double representation of people of color in senior leadership by 2025, currently more than halfway achieved. Pay equity achieved: women earn $1/$1 vs men, people of color earn $1/$1 vs white coworkers.

animals.s: Not applicable. Insurance company does not involve animal testing or animal-related products.

guns.s: Not applicable. Insurance company does not manufacture or directly sell firearms.

privacy.s: Limited public data on comprehensive privacy practices. Company operates as financial services provider handling customer data. No major privacy violations identified in search results.

execPay.s: CEO Tricia Griffith earned $16.38M total compensation in 2024 (93.6% bonuses/stock). Average executive compensation $236,520 annually. CEO pay approximately 69:1 ratio to median employee based on typical insurance company metrics.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
